report_metadata.focus_area: Rentable Shops Near New Bus Stand, Sankarankovil, Tamil Nadu
search_queries_executed: Sankarankovil new bus stand address pincode
commercial areas near new bus stand Sankarankovil address
Rajapalayam road Sankarankovil commercial shops address
nearby areas to new bus stand Sankarankovil for shop rent
data_sources: The Hindu news article on New Bus Stand inauguration

new_bus_stand_details.full_address: New Bus Stand Complex, Sankarankovil, Tamil Nadu 627756
new_bus_stand_details.inaugurated_by: State Government of Tamil Nadu (reported by The Hindu)
new_bus_stand_details.notes: 39 shops within the bus stand complex are prime commercial locations with maximum foot traffic. Availability to be confirmed directly with the municipality.

commercial_streets_and_roads.name: Rajapalayam Main Road (Rajapalayam Road)
commercial_streets_and_roads.description: Primary commercial arterial road connecting Sankarankovil to Rajapalayam. Highest commercial density area with major showrooms, supermarkets, and retail shops.
commercial_streets_and_roads.notes: This is the MAIN commercial road of Sankarankovil. All major national brand showrooms are located here. Premium location for any retail business.

commercial_streets_and_roads.name: Tirunelveli Road (Sankarankovil - Tirunelveli Road)
commercial_streets_and_roads.description: Major road connecting Sankarankovil to Tirunelveli city (55 km). Commercial stretch with hotels, restaurants, departmental stores, and automotive shops.
commercial_streets_and_roads.notes: Also known as Sankarankovil Tirunelveli Road in many business listings. Major transit route with good commercial activity.

commercial_streets_and_roads.name: Kalugumalai Road
commercial_streets_and_roads.description: Road connecting Sankarankovil to Kalugumalai (25 km). Features supermarkets, general stores, and hotels.
commercial_streets_and_roads.notes: Secondary commercial road with good business activity. Food and beverage establishments prominent.

commercial_streets_and_roads.name: North Car Street
commercial_streets_and_roads.description: Traditional market street near the famous Sankaranarayanan Temple. Heritage commercial area with textile shops, jewellery, puja items, and traditional retail.
commercial_streets_and_roads.notes: Temple town heritage street. High footfall during temple festival seasons. Ideal for traditional retail, textiles, and jewellery.

commercial_streets_and_roads.name: Thiru V K A Street
commercial_streets_and_roads.description: Local commercial and residential street with small shops and businesses.
commercial_streets_and_roads.notes: Secondary commercial area suitable for small retail, service shops, and home-based businesses.

commercial_streets_and_roads.name: Geethalaya Road
commercial_streets_and_roads.description: Road with commercial establishments including supermarkets and retail shops.
commercial_streets_and_roads.notes: Well-established local commercial area with AVA Complex being a notable landmark.

commercial_streets_and_roads.name: Kandiyaperi Road (Palaya Pettai)
commercial_streets_and_roads.description: Road leading to Kandiyaperi and Palaya Pettai areas. Has commercial spaces available near the Tirunelveli-Tenkasi highway.
available_amenities: 24 hrs bore water facility available in some properties
commercial_streets_and_roads.notes: Emerging commercial area with lower rents. Good for businesses needing more space (warehouse + retail combo). 500m from the national highway.

commercial_streets_and_roads.name: Railway Feeder Road
commercial_streets_and_roads.description: Road connecting town to Sankarankovil Railway Station. Has auto stand and transport-related businesses.
commercial_streets_and_roads.notes: Transport hub area. Suitable for travel-related businesses, food stalls, and small retail.

commercial_streets_and_roads.name: Tirunelveli Sankarankoil Rajapalayam Srivilliputhur Road
commercial_streets_and_roads.description: Major state highway corridor passing through Sankarankovil connecting multiple towns.
commercial_streets_and_roads.notes: NH corridor with highway traffic. Good visibility for highway-facing businesses, Dhabas, and transit-oriented retail.

commercial_streets_and_roads.name: Thiruvenkadam Salai
commercial_streets_and_roads.description: Road where the Sankarankovil Municipality office is located.
commercial_streets_and_roads.notes: Primarily institutional and residential area with limited commercial activity. Near the municipal administration.

prime_commercial_zone.characteristics: Highest footfall, premium rents, major showrooms, supermarkets, national brand presence

secondary_commercial_zone.description: 500 meters - 1.5 km from New Bus Stand
secondary_commercial_zone.characteristics: Good commercial activity, moderate footfall, local businesses, restaurants, supermarkets

tertiary_commercial_zone.characteristics: Emerging areas, lower rents, suitable for warehouses, larger spaces, highway-facing businesses
examples: Kandiyaperi Road commercial space (500m from NH)

pincodes_in_and_around_sankarankovil.coverage: New Bus Stand, Rajapalayam Road, Tirunelveli Road, North Car Street, Temple area, most commercial zones
Areas just outside Sankarankovil main town
Some Rajapalayam Road businesses may use this pincode (Rajapalayam city pin)

recommendations_for_shop_rental.action: Contact Sankarankovil Municipality (STD: 04636) at 444 Thiruvenkadam Salai to inquire about the 39 shops in the New Bus Stand complex
recommendations_for_shop_rental.reason: Bus stand shops are the most prime commercial locations with maximum foot traffic in the entire town
Largest collection of rental shops in the area with detailed photos and contact info

recommendations_for_shop_rental.action: Contact local estate agents via Justdial: https://www.justdial.com/Sankarankovil/Estate-Agents-For-Commercial-Rental/nct-10192647
recommendations_for_shop_rental.reason: Local agents have the most current availability and can arrange site visits

recommendations_for_shop_rental.action: Focus search on Rajapalayam Main Road (0-500m from New Bus Stand) for premium locations
recommendations_for_shop_rental.reason: This road has the highest commercial density with Reliance SMART Bazaar, TVS showroom, Samsung store, etc.

recommendations_for_shop_rental.action: Consider Kalugumalai Road and Geethalaya Road (500-1000m) for lower-rent alternatives
recommendations_for_shop_rental.reason: Still within walking distance of the bus stand but 30-50% lower rent than main road

recommendations_for_shop_rental.action: Check 99acres for the 75 sq.ft shops at Rs. 6,000/month
recommendations_for_shop_rental.reason: Most affordable confirmed rental rate found - ideal for small retail businesses

recommendations_for_shop_rental.action: Explore Kandiyaperi Road (Palaya Pettai) for warehouse + retail combo spaces
recommendations_for_shop_rental.reason: Good for businesses needing more space at lower cost, 500m from highway

data_limitations: 3 out of 8 search queries were rate-limited by the API (HTTP 429)
Detailed listing pages (OLX, 99acres, Justdial) could not be fully scraped due to rate limiting
Some listings had incomplete addresses (only 'Sankarankovil' without specific street names)
Exact distances from New Bus Stand were not available for all addresses (estimated where possible)
Google Maps Places API was not directly accessible - results are from web search index
Rent estimates are based on limited data points and should be verified with local agents
Two different pincodes (627756 and 626117) appear for Rajapalayam Road addresses - may be boundary area
Current availability of the 39 bus stand shops could not be confirmed (need to contact municipality directly)
